command:
echo "=== Verify group membership and admin status ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8810426999:AAFVOYtkbR2NtFV9-OfvkjeogQo4-gK37W0/getChatAdministrators?chat_id=-1003934415467' | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if d.get('ok'):
    print('Group admins:')
    for a in d['result']:
        u=a.get('user',{})
        print(f\"  {a.get('status')}: @{u.get('username','?')} id={u.get('id')} bot={u.get('is_bot')}\")
else:
    print('error:', d.get('description'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== Confirm can_read_all_group_messages for both ==="
echo -n "Sakura privacy disabled: "
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8810426999:AAFVOYtkbR2NtFV9-OfvkjeogQo4-gK37W0/getMe' | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load(sys.stdin)['result']; print(r.get('can_read_all_group_messages'))"
echo -n "Remy privacy disabled: "
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE/getMe' | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load(sys.stdin)['result']; print(r.get('can_read_all_group_messages'))"
